structure: forall v1 in dataset (forall v2 in dataset (((bfunc1(v1, v2) and bfunc2(v1, v2)) and bfunc3(v1, v2)) implies (not bfunc5(v1, v2))))

signatures.semantics: v1 and v2 belong to different vehicles
v1 and v2 are within the same time period
the GPS locations of v1 and v2 are spatially close
the instantaneous speeds of v1 and v2 are close (the absolute speed difference does not exceed a certain value)
